cards.back: An iterative method for finding a stationary point in a non-convex optimization problem, where the objective function is projected onto the constraint set at each iteration
A stochastic optimization technique inspired by natural selection and genetics, used to find a global optimum in non-convex optimization problems
A mathematical result stating that a non-convex optimization algorithm will converge to a stationary point in the limit, which may or may not be a global optimum
A property of a non-convex optimization function indicating whether the function's gradient is zero at a critical point, which is a necessary condition for convergence
A result stating that a non-convex optimization algorithm will converge to a stationary point in a finite number of iterations if the objective function is locally convex at that point
